# Canada

**Summary**: A region in North America containing the Pelican Lake field.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023]] used data from the Pelican Lake field to model heavy oil reservoir conditions.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023]] Wabiskaw unconsolidated sandstone

## Formations Present

- [[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023]] Wabiskaw formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- The Pelican Lake field had a low viscosity ratio of 0.01 and produced only 23,996 BBL. ([[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023, p. 73]])
